content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(5, 8, 1), (3, 4, 2), (1, 5, 5), (0, 5, 8), (4, 5, 10), (6, 9, 10), (1, 8, 13), (6, 7, 14), (1, 2, 16), (2, 7, 17), (7, 9, 17), (0, 4, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 10.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (5, 8, 1) has node 5 and time 1. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 4, 2) has node 3 and time 2. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 5, 5) has node 1 and time 5. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 5, 8) has node 0 and time 8. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 5, 10) has node 4 and time 10. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (6, 9, 10) has node 6 and time 10. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 8, 13) has node 1 and time 13. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 7, 14) has node 6 and time 14. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 2, 16) has node 1 and time 16. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (2, 7, 17) has node 2 and time 17. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (7, 9, 17) has node 7 and time 17. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 4, 19) has node 0 and time 19. -> Add node 4.

Now we have the following nodes matched: 8, 4, 5, 9, 7.

Answer: [8, 4, 5, 9, 7]
